creative_film.label: 电影创意探索
creative_film.negative_prompt: no generic composition, no cliché visual language, no random style mixing, no emotional disconnect, no flat narrative, no derivative imagery
creative_film.camera_rule: one motivated camera move per shot, cinematic language required
creative_film.lighting_rule: deliberate lighting logic with emotional motivation for each light source

ecommerce.label: 电商产品
ecommerce.negative_prompt: no logo distortion, no text artifacts, no packaging collapse, no duplicate product, no label blur, no warped glass, no cap drift
ecommerce.camera_rule: single slow movement, product must stay center-frame
ecommerce.lighting_rule: light source must not obscure product labels or text

ugc.label: UGC 原生广告
ugc.negative_prompt: no extra fingers, no face drift, no lip mismatch, no background warping, no product disappearance, no shaky framing, no eye drift
ugc.camera_rule: slight handheld feel, maintain social-native pacing
ugc.performance_rule: one creator, one message beat, one simple gesture

cinematic.label: 电影感品牌短片
cinematic.negative_prompt: no shaky camera, no object melting, no random text, no muddy lighting, no flat blacks, no text watermark
cinematic.camera_rule: one motivated camera move per shot, no mixed movements
cinematic.lighting_rule: deliberate lighting logic with controlled contrast

multi_shot.label: 多镜头叙事
multi_shot.negative_prompt: no character drift between cuts, no scene inconsistency, no transition artifacts, no text watermark

one_shot.label: 一镜到底
one_shot.negative_prompt: no abrupt cuts, no spatial discontinuity, no object mutation between frames, no stutter in transitions, no frame-tearing
one_shot.camera_rule: continuous spatial flow, no hard cuts

viral_replicate.label: 爆款复刻
viral_replicate.negative_prompt: no style drift from reference, no subject identity loss, no mismatched pacing, no warped replacement subject, no original ghosting
viral_replicate.camera_rule: replicate reference video camera style and pacing

agent_mode.label: Agent 模式
agent_mode.negative_prompt: no text watermark, no shaky camera, no object melting, no style inconsistency
agent_mode.camera_rule: agent auto-selects camera style based on intent

short_drama.label: 短剧创作
short_drama.negative_prompt: no character face drift across episodes, no costume inconsistency, no scene discontinuity, no voice mismatch, no subtitle desync
